summary: Kept #56783 as the canonical Control UI chat-history character-budget PR. Kept #42636 open as related, not duplicate, because it targets the distinct hydration/render-window limit. Kept #65575 open as independent from this history-budget cluster because it belongs to the separate #65538 screen-reader streaming accessibility family. No close, label, merge, or fix actions are planned.

actions.reason: #56783 is the best surviving canonical PR for the chat-history character-budget root cause, but this dedupe-only job should leave it open for review and validation.
Related Control UI chat-load work, but not a true duplicate of #56783 and not safe to close under the contributor-credit closure policy.
Independent from this history-budget dedupe cluster; leave it open for the separate #65538 accessibility triage path.
